Project: Quest
Institution: CNI
Status: Em desenvolvimento
Type: PHP/MySQL educational platform MVP

Summary:
Quest is a personal project by Marcelo Botura with idea support from CNI.
The repository now contains an MVP for authentication, role-based access control, password reset, collaborative question banking, and initial exam building.

Files:
- index.php: entry page for the PHP application.
- dashboard.php: role-aware application dashboard.
- users.php: master admin page to promote users to local admin.
- questions.php: collaborative question bank with filters, favorites, cloning, and author editing.
- exams.php: initial exam builder using visible questions.
- database.sql: MySQL schema and initial master admin seed.
- config.php: application and database configuration.
- README.md: human-readable project overview and local run instructions.
- history.txt: short change log and project history.

Current behavior:
- Supports user registration, login, logout, and password reset.
- Uses three roles: master_admin, local_admin, and user.
- Allows master_admin to manage user roles.
- Allows authenticated users to create private and public questions.
- Supports multiple choice, discursive, and drawing question types.
- Supports disciplines, subjects, filters, favorites, and question cloning.
- Supports initial exam creation and increments question usage counts.
- Stores data in MySQL through PDO.

Notes for LLMs:
- The project status is development.
- The institution associated with the project is CNI.
- Marcelo Botura is the personal project owner.
- Prefer preserving the role and permission model already implemented.
